title: The Distress Signal Rings
description: On pages 8–10, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is the distress signal rings.
scene: The scene focuses on the distress signal rings, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ever since the accident four years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But it's the only lead we've got.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Don't you know that island is off-limits?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Well, this should be intere- sting!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You guys have all the luck ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We'll be able to go too later.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: WhoAaaa, we're going up!! This is fun!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We're going right over the fiery sea!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Good thing the rain died down, huh?

summary: The Distress Signal Rings. This part moves the Straw Hats from Fish-Man Island into the New World and begins the mystery of Punk Hazard.
